data.title: Philippines: TotalEnergies and Nextnorth Reach Financial Close and Start Construction of a 440 MW Solar Project
data.description: TotalEnergies, in partnership with Nextnorth, a renewable energy developer in the Philippines, have confirmed the financial closure and commencement of construction for a solar power plant with a capacity of 440 MWp. Situated in Ilagan City, Isabela Province, the project is jointly owned by TotalEnergies (65%) and Nextnorth (35%) and is anticipated to be operational by the conclusion of 2027. Upon completion, the plant is expected to generate 13.5 TWh of energy over a span of 20 years.
China Containerized Freight Index rose by 2.9% w/w to 1,269.64. $CCFI

data.title: Tenchijin Announces Partnership with Aqualter
data.description: In Chartres, France, Tenchijin Inc., a leading Japanese space-tech company focused on sustainable water infrastructure management, has recently partnered with Aqualter. The partnership, established in April 2026, involves a Strategic Software License Agreement. As part of this agreement, Tenchijin’s advanced platform, KnoWaterleak, utilizing satellite data and artificial intelligence, will be implemented in Aqualter's extensive water service operation initiative for metropolitan Chartres. This collaboration aims to enhance the efficiency of water leakage detection and overall water management in the area.

data.title: HI-VIEW COMMENCES TRADING ON AMERICA’S OTCQB MARKETPLACE UNDER “GXLDF”
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 30, 2026, Hi-View Resources Inc. ("Hi-View" or the "Company") has revealed that its common shares are now being traded on the OTCQB Venture Market under the symbol "GXLDF". With the aim of boosting visibility among U.S. investors and facilitating trading access, the Company's shares are listed under the tickers CSE: GXLD; OTCQB: GXLDF; FSE: B630. This move is significant as it allows for increased exposure and easier trading for interested parties.

data.title: 21shares Partners with Kaiko Indices to Enhance Pricing Precision Across European Single-Asset Crypto Suite
data.description: On April 30, 2026, 21Shares, a prominent player in cryptocurrency exchange-traded products, announced a successful shift of the underlying index provider for a significant portion of its European single-asset product range to Kaiko Indices. Kaiko Indices, a BMR-registered benchmark administrator, ensures adherence to the most rigorous compliance standards for institutional product launches. This move marks a strategic development in 21Shares’ operations and emphasizes its commitment to offering reliable and compliant products in the market.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Mastercard Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Mastercard Incorporated (NYSE: MA) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on Thursday, April 30. Analysts predict earnings of $4.41 per share, up from $3.73 per share last year. The estimated revenue for the quarter is $8.26 billion, compared to $7.25 billion in the previous year. Recently, Mastercard revealed its plan to acquire BVNK, a stablecoin infrastructure leader, for up to $1.8 billion on March 17. On Wednesday, Mastercard's shares closed at $525.23, marking a 3.5% increase. The latest analyst ratings can be accessed on Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page, allowing readers to sort by various criteria. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: NEP Bow Tie Supports the Senedd in Delivering its 2110 Broadcast Infrastructure
data.description: NEP Bow Tie has secured the Broadcast Operations and Maintenance contract at the Senedd in Cardiff, UK. The 2022 Invitation to Tender highlighted goals such as upgrading broadcasting infrastructure, replacing outdated equipment, and transitioning to a broadcast-over-IP model for improved business continuity and disaster recovery. The contract entails crucial responsibilities for managing operations at the Welsh Parliament, indicating a strategic shift towards modernizing technical capabilities for efficient broadcasting services.

data.title: SAROS Launches Worldwide Exclusively on PlayStation®5
data.description: Sony Interactive Entertainment has just launched SAROS, the latest single-player action game by Housemarque, worldwide. The game is now available on PlayStation®5 (PS5®) and follows the story of Arjun Devraj, played by Rahul Kohli, known for his roles in The Haunting of Bly Manor and Midnight Mass. Arjun Devraj is a Soltari enforcer on a mission to uncover the mysteries of the shape-shifting planet Carcosa, filled with secrets and dangerous creatures. SAROS is currently out for players to enjoy globally.

data.title: OneAdvanced Launches IQ, a new Intelligent System of Work
data.description: In Birmingham, England, OneAdvanced, a major UK provider of industry-specific SaaS, has introduced IQ, an innovative system of work. This marks the first time ISO 42001 policies have been incorporated alongside AI within workflows. IQ merges extensive sector knowledge with secure, regulated, and contextual AI capabilities throughout business processes. Despite substantial AI investments, organizations have faced challenges in maintaining lasting benefits due to fragmented data, absence of context, and deficiencies in achieving sustained impact.

data.title: Why Is Aware Stock Falling After Hours Today?
data.description: Shares of Aware (NASDAQ: AWRE) plummeted by over 16% to $1.22 in after-hours trading on Wednesday. The company, specializing in biometric identity and authentication solutions, released its quarterly earnings report, emphasizing its shift towards a platform-driven model. In the first quarter, Aware generated $3.4 million in revenue, down from $3.6 million in the same period last year. Operating expenses surged to $7.0 million from $5.5 million, with around $0.7 million attributed to one-time severance costs related to staff reductions. The net loss expanded to $3.5 million, or $0.16 per share, compared to $1.6 million, or $0.08 per share, in the previous year’s first quarter. Adjusted EBITDA loss worsened to $3.2 million, from $1.5 million in Q1 of 2025.

data.title: Chairman of the Board of Invalda INVL was elected
data.description: During the general shareholders meeting of Invalda INVL on April 30, 2026, Alvydas Banys, Indrė Mišeikytė, and Tomas Bubinas were elected to the Board for a four-year term. Alvydas Banys was subsequently chosen as the Chairman of the Board during the same meeting.

data.title: Eli Lilly Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: Eli Lilly and Company is set to reveal its first-quarter earnings on April 30, before the market opens. Analysts are anticipating earnings of $6.79 per share, a significant increase from the previous year's $3.34 per share. The consensus among analysts is that the company will report quarterly revenue of $17.8 billion, compared to $12.73 billion the previous year. In recent developments, Profluent and Eli Lilly have formed a strategic collaboration to develop custom site-specific recombinases for treating genetic diseases. On the trading front, Eli Lilly's stock dipped by 2.6% to close at $851.21 on Wednesday. For more updates and analyst ratings, readers can refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga Pro.
